title: Metro Transit Accessibility Analysis
author: Chris Heins
thumbnail_alt_text: Map showing the city of St Paul along with hex bins of transit job access counts.
popup_alt_text: Overview map of the twin cities metro region showing hex bins of percent of people who take transit to work.
description: Accessibility analysis of the Metro Transit network in the Twin Cities using a population hex grid and R5Py network analysis engine. Highlights areas with high and low access to jobs via the transit network and explores demographic characteristics of populations along transit routes. The process uses publicly available datasets, a PostGIS database, and is documented in a Jupyter notebook for replicability.
